response:
subject: Thank you for your helpful and detailed response  

body:  

Dear Mr. Klimkovic,  

Thank you for your helpful and detailed response. I wanted to express my appreciation for the assistance provided.  

Regarding the current machine vision system, I believe there may be a misunderstanding about the model in use. The system is currently configured as FLIR FL3-U3-120S3C-C, and the image sensor employed is the Sony IMX172, not the e2V sensor as previously indicated.  

Attached to this email, I have included the technical data for reference. Please find the FL3-U3-Technical-Reference PDF file for detailed specifications and the FL3-U3-EMVA-Imaging PDF file, specifically page 13, for quantum efficiency information.  

I will review these files and manuals more thoroughly and will inform you of my findings.  

Thank you again for your support.  

Best regards,  
[Your Name]
